title: Migrate remaining CSV exporters to shared helper pattern
description:
analysis.go, cards.go, and archetypes.go still duplicate exporter setup and type assertion boilerplate. Migrate them to assertCSVExportType/writeCSVRows for consistency with recently refactored player/battle/events exporters.

Candidate files:
- internal/exporter/csv/analysis.go
- internal/exporter/csv/cards.go
- internal/exporter/csv/archetypes.go

title: Extend shared CSV helpers to battle/player/events exporters
description:
After completing clash-royale-api-w8o, player.go, battle.go, and events.go still duplicate exporter construction and type-assertion boilerplate. Migrate these remaining CSV exporters to assertCSVExportType/writeCSVRows for consistency and reduced drift.

Candidate files:
- internal/exporter/csv/player.go
- internal/exporter/csv/battle.go
- internal/exporter/csv/events.go
close_reason: Completed: migrated player/battle/events exporters to shared type-assert and CSV write helpers

title: Roll out shared CSV export helpers to remaining exporters
description:
After clash-royale-api-zzt introduced assertCSVExportType/writeCSVRows, analysis/cards/archetypes exporters still duplicate type-assert + BaseExporter wiring. Migrate remaining CSV exporters to shared helpers to fully remove repeated boilerplate and keep error formatting consistent.

Candidate files:
- internal/exporter/csv/analysis.go
- internal/exporter/csv/cards.go
- internal/exporter/csv/archetypes.go
close_reason: Completed: migrated analysis/cards/archetypes CSV exporters to shared type-assert and row-write helpers

title: Extract shared compare-output section renderers
description:
compare_format_table.go, compare_format_markdown.go, and compare_format_report.go repeat the same conceptual rendering loops for best-in-category lines, deck card grids, and verbose defense/attack/synergy sections. This duplication increases drift risk whenever evaluation fields or wording changes.

Candidate extraction points:
- cmd/cr-api/compare_format_table.go:89-103,121-159
- cmd/cr-api/compare_format_markdown.go:69-117
- cmd/cr-api/compare_format_report.go:128-213

Refactor target: shared section data builders + small format-specific emitters so only style differs by output format.

title: Consolidate CSV exporter type-assertion and write boilerplate
description:
CSV export functions repeat the same pattern: type assert input, build rows, instantiate BaseExporter with literal filename, and write to subdir. The repetition makes it easy to diverge on error handling and output paths.

Repeated locations include:
- internal/exporter/csv/player.go:68-79,172-204
- internal/exporter/csv/battle.go:45-56,135-155
- internal/exporter/csv/events.go:25-41,73-113

Refactor target: helper utilities for typed export execution + shared file writer wiring while preserving existing headers and row shapes.
close_reason: Implemented shared assert/write helpers and migrated player/battle/events CSV exporters

title: Extract shared suite summary mapper for build/analyze runtimes
description: Both runPhase1BuildDeckVariations and deckBuildSuiteCommand build deck.SuiteDeckSummary slices with near-duplicate field mapping. Add shared helpers in cmd/cr-api/deck_build_runtime.go to convert suite deck records into SuiteDeckSummary to reduce duplication and drift while preserving output behavior.

title: Repair stale beads references in suite runtime nolint comments
description: cmd/cr-api/deck_analyze_suite_runtime.go still references non-existent task ID clash-royale-api-1g1r in nolint rationale. Update to live issue IDs and add a lint check script to detect stale clash-royale-api-* references.

title: Extract shared suite deck-build orchestration pipeline
description: runPhase1BuildDeckVariations in cmd/cr-api/deck_analyze_suite_runtime.go duplicates strategy/variation build loop, deck save, and summary assembly logic already present in buildAllStrategies in cmd/cr-api/deck_build_runtime.go. Extract shared orchestration helpers for build loop + suite summary generation to reduce drift and complexity.

title: Deduplicate offline analysis loading across CLI runtimes
description: Refactor cmd runtime loaders to reuse analysis_helpers.loadOfflineAnalysisFromFlags instead of duplicating file/tag fallback logic in suite and builder paths.
close_reason: Completed: runtime loaders now reuse loadOfflineAnalysisFromFlags in suite and builder paths
